results.rendered_html:
lalitā
1 A woman(in general).
2 A wanton woman.
3 Musk.
4 A form of Durgā.
5 N. of various metres.
Comp.
— paṃcamī the fifth day in the bright half of Āśvina.
— saptamī the seventh day
(pb) in the bright half of Bhādrapada.
